softDeleteDialog.title: Move Contact to Trash
softDeleteDialog.description: The contact will be removed from active lists but will remain available for restoration from trash.
softDeleteDialog.body: This step does not permanently delete the contact. All data remains available for recovery, audit, and a safe permanent deletion later from trash when needed.

permanentDeleteDialog.title: Permanently Delete Contact
permanentDeleteDialog.description: The contact will be permanently removed from the system if no blocking dependencies exist.
permanentDeleteDialog.body: Permanent deletion cannot be undone. It should only be used from trash after confirming that the record and its history are no longer needed.

trash.permanentDeleteConfirm: This action cannot be undone. The contact will be permanently deleted.
trash.emptyTrashConfirm: All contacts in trash will be permanently deleted.
trash.autoDeleteWarning: Contacts in trash are automatically deleted after 30 days.
trash.filesInTrashWithContact: This contact is in trash. Its files have been moved to trash as well.

messages.allow: No downstream dependencies were detected for the fields being changed.
messages.warn: Changing these fields will affect connected data and live displays. Review the impact before continuing.
messages.block: This change cannot continue while attendance or employment records still depend on these identity fields.
messages.unavailable: The dependency preview did not complete reliably. Saving was blocked until the check becomes available again.

changeSummary.cleared: This field will be cleared. Current value: "{from}"

projectLinks.label: Project links
projectLinks.remediation: Review the projects where this person participates so displayed names and roles remain consistent.

attendanceEvents.label: Attendance events
attendanceEvents.remediation: Review or correct attendance records before changing identity data used in worker resolution.

employmentRecords.label: Employment records / stamps
employmentRecords.remediation: These fields affect EFKA/IKA historical records. Correct the related records first or use a controlled correction process.

contactRelationships.label: Contact relationships
contactRelationships.remediation: Review organizational and relationship views where this service appears before finalizing the change.

linkedProjects.label: Linked projects and roles
linkedProjects.description: Live displays of this person in project lists, selectors, and role views will update.

searchAndReporting.label: Search and reporting
searchAndReporting.description: The new value will appear in live search, exports, and report builder views that read contact data.

ikaAttendance.label: IKA attendance / worker resolution
ikaAttendance.description: AMKA is used to resolve workers in attendance flows and QR check-ins.

employmentCompliance.label: Employment and compliance
employmentCompliance.description: Employment records and compliance calculations may require a coordinated correction flow.

documentsAndIdentifiers.label: Documents and identifiers
documentsAndIdentifiers.description: Changing numbers and issuing authorities affects future documents, identity checks, and administrative workflows.

relationshipViews.label: Relationship views and org structure
relationshipViews.description: The new values will appear in relationship cards, organizational trees, and selectors.
